parties.name: COSEY, LETICIA M. 746 RAILROAD AVENUE PITTSBURG, CA 94565

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Leticia Cosey, via Zoom, in propria persona Petitioner.

At the court's query, Ms. Cosey offers the court an update regarding her efforts with this matter.

Upon conclusion of Ms. Cosey's report, the court advises that it intends to take the petition off calendar, and she may re-file once she is ready. No objection is presented to the court's tentative ruling. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leticia Cosey appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Cosey stated that it is her desire to continue to pursue formal probate, that she can't do anything without letters of administration, that the banks are rejecting the affidavit of small estate, that she doesn't understand it and that she is at the point where she wants to sue the banks. Mrs. Cosey also stated that she is the only child, that everything goes to her, that her attorney doesn't understand it, that it is causing her an economic hardship, and that the banks are Wells Fargo and Direct Express which is a subsidiary of Comerica Bank. In addition, Mrs. Cosey spoke of the difficulty in communicating with Comerica, stated that Social Security has also contacted Direct Express, that Wells Fargo keeps going back to the letters of administration, and that her aunt which was her mom's representative payee will not give up any documents. The court noted that there are a number of procedural issues with the petition. Mrs. Cosey stated that she submitted documents, but they were sent back to her, and that she is unable to afford the fee for publication. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to September 20, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to give Mrs. Cosey the opportunity to get all of the issues corrected.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leticia Cosey, Petitioner in pro per, present in the courtroom

Ms. Cosey advises the Court of the circumstances of the Estate, notably reporting that while the total estate is estimated to be less that $10,000, she has been advised by several banks that they will not recognize a Probate Code Sec. 13100 Declaration and will only perform pursuant to receipt of Letters of Administration. The Court will confer with the Court Examiner regarding alternatives.

The Court continues the matter to August 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Choi. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
